name: COMMUNITY BANCORP /VT
summary: Community Bancorp /VT is a Vermont bank holding company operating through its subsidiary Community National Bank, founded in 1851. It provides business banking, commercial real estate lending, residential mortgage lending, retail credit, municipal banking, and retail banking services to individuals, businesses, nonprofits, and municipalities in northern and central Vermont. It also offers trust and wealth management through affiliated non-depository trust company CFSG.

products.name: Business Banking
products.description: Credit products, business checking, cash management, ACH/wire transfers, card processing, and remote deposit capture for businesses.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Lending
products.description: Financing for commercial developers, residential builders, and community development entities including SBA 7(a) and 504 loans.

products.name: Residential Real Estate Lending
products.description: Conventional, FHA/VA, fixed and adjustable rate mortgage loans, construction loans, and home equity products.

products.name: Retail Credit
products.description: Personal, automobile, boat/recreational vehicle loans and credit cards through third-party marketing alliance.

products.name: Municipal and Institutional Banking
products.description: Deposit accounts, tax-exempt loans, lines of credit, and FHLBB-collateralized secured deposit products for governments and nonprofits.

products.name: Retail Banking
products.description: Consumer checking, savings, ATMs, debit/credit cards, night deposit, and online/mobile/telephone banking.

products.name: Trust and Wealth Management
products.description: Fiduciary and wealth management services offered through affiliated trust company CFSG, based in Newport, Vermont.

partnerships.partner_name: Federal Home Loan Bank of Boston (FHLBB)
partnerships.description: Offers secured deposit product to municipal customers collateralized by FHLBB letters of credit.
Co-owner of CFS Partners LLC, which owns trust company CFSG; holds 50% interest post-2025 redemption.
Recognized as Vermont's top Section 7(a) lender and top third-party 504 program lender.
